UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores user-specific data required for lunar calculations and app personalization.

birthDate.description: The user's birth date in YYYY-MM-DD format, used to calculate lunar age.

StickyNote.title: StickyNote
StickyNote.description: Stores a user's single, persistent sticky note.

content.description: The main text content of the sticky note.

notificationTime.description: The scheduled ISO 8601 time for the notification.

notificationVoice.description: The identifier for the notification voice.

Post.title: Post
Post.description: A link or article shared by a user.

url.description: The URL of the shared link.

summary.description: A user-provided summary of the content.

topic.description: The category or topic of the post.

authorId.description: The UID of the user who created the post.

authorName.description: The display name of the user who created the post.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the post was created.

commentCount.description: The number of comments on the post.

postId.description: The ID of the post this comment belongs to.

authorId.description: The UID of the user who wrote the comment.

authorName.description: The display name of the user who wrote the comment.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the comment was created.

Snap.title: Snap
Snap.description: A photograph shared by a user in the Snaps gallery.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the uploaded image.

description.description: A brief description of the snap.

imageHint.description: One or two keywords for AI image search.

authorId.description: The UID of the user who uploaded the snap.

authorName.description: The display name of the user who uploaded the snap.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the snap was created.

likes.description: The number of likes the snap has received.

likedBy.description: An array of user UIDs who have liked the snap.

description.description: A detailed description of the challenge.

badge.description: A descriptive badge for the challenge (e.g., 'Long-Term').

progress.description: The completion progress, typically for official challenges (0-100).

participants.description: The number of users participating in the challenge.

creatorId.description: The UID of the user who created the challenge (for community challenges).

creatorName.description: The display name of the user who created the challenge.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the challenge was created.

UserEvent.title: UserEvent
UserEvent.description: A custom event created by a user on their lunar calendar.

date.description: The date of the event in YYYY-MM-DD format.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the event was created.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores individual user profiles. The document ID (`{userId}`) matches the Firebase Authentication UID.

/users/{userId}/sticky_notes/{noteId}.description: A subcollection for a user's notes. For now, we only use a single document with the ID 'main'.

/users/{userId}/events/{eventId}.description: A subcollection for a user's custom calendar events.

/posts/{postId}.description: A collection of all posts shared by the community. The document ID is auto-generated.

/posts/{postId}/comments/{commentId}.description: A subcollection for comments on a specific post.

/snaps/{snapId}.description: A collection of all snaps shared by the community. The document ID is auto-generated.

/challenges/{challengeId}.description: A collection of all challenges, both official and community-created.
